title: dactylorhiza bartonii
intro: Dactylorhiza bartonii, also known as the Barton's orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the United Kingdom. This terrestrial orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza bartonii are said to include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Dactylorhiza bartonii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, infusions, and dried extracts, although its use is largely limited due to its rarity and conservation status.
